content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Classy Numbers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1036/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers.
content.outputFormat: Print the number of classy numbers in the given array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check each number in the array to see if it is a classy number by verifying if it has exactly 3 distinct prime factors.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n * sqrt(m)) where n is the number of elements in the array and m is the maximum value in the array
